description: anvilml-worker: respawn.rs RespawnPolicy with backoff and max-attempt guard
context: Implement RespawnPolicy in crates/anvilml-worker/src/respawn.rs. Fields: {delay_ms:u64,max_attempts:u32,window_s:u32} all pub. should_respawn(&self,crash_count:&mut u32,last_crash:Instant)->bool: reset *crash_count=0 if last_crash.elapsed()>=window_s, return false if *crash_count>=max_attempts, else *crash_count+=1 and return true. next_delay_ms(&self,attempt:u32)->u64: delay_ms*2^attempt capped at 30000ms. Tests in tests/respawn_tests.rs: >=4 covering max exceeded, within window, window reset, backoff sequence. cargo test -p anvilml-worker --features mock-hardware -- respawn exits 0.

description: anvilml-worker/server: complete crash detection, respawn cycle, and operator restart
context: Read managed.rs, pool.rs, keepalive.rs on disk. Add 7 fields to ManagedWorker (crash_count,last_crash,cfg,device,transport,timeout_rx:oneshot::Receiver<()>,restart_rx:watch::Receiver<u64>); event_tx->Option<Sender>. do_respawn(&mut self,consult_policy): policy+backoff when true, spawn()+*self=new. Add timeout+restart arms; loop_child=self.child.take() before each select!. WorkerPool::restart_worker() increments watch counter. POST /v1/workers/{id}/restart->202. Tests assert Dead||Respawning. cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware exits 0.

description: anvilml-worker/server: verify Phase 010 implementation and document findings
context: Verification-only task — no source code changes. Read managed.rs, pool.rs, handlers/workers.rs, managed_tests.rs, pool_tests.rs, workers_tests.rs on disk. Run: cargo fmt --all --check; cargo clippy --workspace --features mock-hardware -- -D warnings; cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware. Produce .forge/reports/P10-A3_implement.md documenting as-built architecture vs P10-A2 plan. If any test fails or clippy warning exists, write under Blockers and stop — do not attempt fixes. Status=COMPLETE only if all three commands exit 0.
